self_improvement.claim: Directive Workspace can now align Runtime downstream approval legality with the live current head instead of trusting stale artifact-local status text.
self_improvement.mechanism: The adopted slice retains one shared current-head legality rule for Runtime approval surfaces and openers.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Before this DEEP opener, stale historical Runtime artifacts could still look openable even after the case advanced to promotion-readiness.
self_improvement.expected_effect: The host detail layer and approval boundary will stop advertising or authorizing those stale openings.

decision.rationale: The slice is small, shared, and directly aligned with the current whole-product hardening bottleneck.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
